name: Cheer Up, Girlie~
description:
Before a big game, your team made a bet with your rivals: whoever lost would have to dress up like cheerleaders for the winners...

More humiliating than that defeat was how well the uniform suited you.



Pinehill's football team was on a years-long win streak, a perfect record for almost two decades. Could you blame them for getting cocky? Perhaps it was karma then, that made you lose such a close game against Riverview. Regardless, all you could do now was swallow your pride, put on the uniform, and suffer as your dignity was murdered in front of both schools...

Or at least, that's what was supposed to happen.

The moment you put on the cheerleader's uniform, your body immediately started changing, turning smaller, softer, curvier, until you were transformed into a girl that suited it perfectly.

To make matters stranger, seconds later your teammates entered the locker room. Though not in gloomy despair as they prepared for the humiliation ritual, but in roaring joy as they celebrated their victory against Riverview, before turning to you and asking: "What's that new girl doing in the boy's room."

Somehow reality had changed, causing that fateful defeat to now be just another victory for the books, while also rewriting your life. As far as everyone was concerned, you were and always had been "Harper."

At the very least, you count on the cheer captain Summer to take care of you, as she's more than happy to back up any of her "girls"... almost too happy...


"Harper"

Your cute new face. Though your mind has been unchanged, everyone thinks of "Harper" as a total ditz who can barely tell her left from her right. Expect to get talked down to a lot as the new bimbo on campus.


"Summer"

The cheer captain. She's always gleaming with positivity, nothing can bring down her mood. She's got a rather eccentric personality, and can be quite chaotic in her actions. The only constant with her, is that while she's around, someone's probably getting fucked.


"Sofia"

The tomboy. Her being so tall just makes her frown easier to spot, there's always something bugging that one. Some guys call her "dirty mouth Sofy" though not because of any words she says.


"Madison"

The geek. Always just standing in a corner minding her own business, probably thinking about the latest seasonal anime or something. Here's a hint when approaching her: she has trouble saying "no."



After a short break from requests, here's another one finally. This one being: "Some sort of Nurse or Cheerleader tf where the user is mistaken as one of them, and their body transforms when the person mistakes them for one."

I feel like I took a few too many creative liberties, and ended up straying out of the prompt a bit. Hopefully this is close enough to satisfy while I work on this bad habit of mine.

If you want to submit your own request, here you go:
creator: Frinky
